scripts.mmdc: mmdc -i assets/architecture.mmd -o assets/architecture.svg -b transparent -w 1280 -H 720 && mmdc -i assets/ai-flow.mmd -o assets/ai-flow.svg -b transparent -w 1280 -H 720
scripts.dev: pnpm mmdc && marp nlp.md --html --allow-local-files -o nlp.html && marp dl.md --html --allow-local-files -o dl.html && marp --allow-local-files -w -s .
scripts.build: pnpm mmdc && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/index.html && marp slide.md --html --allow-local-files -o dist/slide.html && marp nlp.md --html --allow-local-files -o dist/nlp.html && marp dl.md --html --allow-local-files -o dist/dl.html && cp -r assets dist/
